title: It’s Nice That My Wife Came
overview: One day, suddenly, a girl who loves me appears ── In front of Oda Nobunaga, a descendant of Oda Nobunaga, a girl named Sai Rattan Return Butterfly appears. When she hears the story, she seems to be Nobunaga's Masamuro's rattan return butterfly himself ...

title: Nobunaga's Determination
overview: Kichou is moving into Nobunaga's apartment. She does her best to persuade him that he should make a baby with her even though she's underage, and he tries to resist as best he can.

title: Going Back to School
overview: Kichou goes to school, where she meets another girl who's in love with Nobunaga. The two decided to have a competition in class to see who can convince him to sleep with them.

title: To Inabayama Castle
overview: The group takes a trip to Inabayama Castle, where Kichou realizes for the first time that she is, indeed, from the past.

title: Two People
overview: A second girl appears from the past. This one is also underage, but she has the mind of a 29 year old! So it's legal...or is it?

title: Wash Your Back
overview: Now that both Kitsuno and Kichou are home with Nobunaga, it's time for fighting over who gets to take a bath with him!

title: Third Person
overview: Anna tries her best to get Nobunaga to fall in love with her. Kitsuno follows him to school where things just get worse.

title: Fourth Person
overview: Hoshigaoka invites Oda out for a night of drinking. But it's actually an excuse to get him someplace isolated...

title: I Like It
overview: At Jitoku'in's demand, Nobunaga sucks on her breasts. He's excited, think that she'll be able to marry her. But her host strongly refuses...

title: Fifth Person!?
overview: Nobunaga discovers that one of his "wives" brothers is also a person from his past. And this boy is in love with him too...

title: Hope of Koun-in and Nabe
overview: Jitoku'in's breasts are bothering her again, and she wants Nobunaga to take care of it. But her host demands a more permanent solution.

title: My Wife Said She Wouldn't Go Home
overview: The way to cure one of the ghosts is to give them what they wanted to have in their past life. But how does that work when one of them was a boy who wanted to sleep with Nobunaga?
